name: ARSS Infrastructure Projects Limited
summary: ARSS Infrastructure Projects Limited engages in the construction activities in India. The company undertakes construction of railway, road, urban, marine, bridge, power, and irrigation work projects. It primarily serves government, public sector undertakings, and other government agencies. The company was formerly known as ARSS Stones Pvt. Ltd. and changed its name to ARSS Infrastructure Projects Limited in April 2006. ARSS Infrastructure Projects Limited was founded in 2000 and is based in New Delhi, India.
